events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Mick Jagger, the iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, was born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Mick's Moves
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still moving like Jagger! Wishing a very happy birthday to the legendary Rolling Stones frontman, Sir Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: MTV, originally an initialism for Music Television, launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first music video.

angles.name: Video Killed the Radio Star
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, a new era began as MTV hit the airwaves, forever changing music and pop culture. And yes, The Buggles were right.

events.title: Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe' anniversary
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, which became the fastest-selling debut album in British history.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Debut
angles.copy: Remembering the moment Britpop truly ignited. Oasis's game-changing debut 'Definitely Maybe' dropped back in '94 and still sounds as fresh today.

events.title: Woodstock Festival anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, an iconic three-day festival of peace and music, took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since half a million gathered for three days of peace and music. The spirit of Woodstock lives on.

events.title: Elvis Presley would have been 91
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', passed away on August 16, 1977. He was born on January 8, 1935.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years since we lost the King. Remembering the incomparable Elvis Presley, whose music continues to inspire generations. He would have been 91 today.

events.title: Tupac Shakur would have been 55
events.blurb: Rapper Tupac Shakur was shot in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996, and tragically passed away six days later on September 13, 1996. He was born on June 16, 1971.

angles.name: Tupac Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering a voice that shaped a generation. Today, we reflect on the enduring legacy of Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55.

events.title: Jimi Hendrix would have been 84
events.blurb: Legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix died on September 18, 1970. He was born on November 27, 1942.

angles.name: Jimi's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix, who left us too soon but whose music continues to electrify. He would have been 84.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album was released in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Magic
angles.copy: That iconic cover, those timeless tracks. Celebrating the anniversary of The Beatles' masterpiece, 'Abbey Road'.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Hynde's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! Still rocking and captivating audiences worldwide.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Liam Gallagher, the distinctive voice of Oasis, was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: LG's Big Day
angles.copy: He's still got it. Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher!

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' anniversary
events.blurb: John Lennon's powerful anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK on October 24, 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-one years since John Lennon gave us 'Imagine' in the UK. A message of peace and unity that resonates as strongly today.

events.title: Original iPod launched 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music players.

angles.name: iPod Revolution
angles.copy: Remember shuffling through your entire music library in your pocket? The original iPod launched 25 years ago, changing how we listen forever.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day celebrates the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', on October 5, 1962.

angles.name: Shaken Not Stirred
angles.copy: Grab your martini, it's James Bond Day! Celebrating over six decades of 007, from classic cool to modern thrillers.

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Lennon, the legendary co-founder of The Beatles, was born on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: Lennon's Birthday
angles.copy: Remembering the visionary John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The celebrated British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese was born on October 27, 1939.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the incomparable John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true British comedy icon.

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles' self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', was released on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: White Album Classic
angles.copy: Fifty-eight years since The Beatles delivered their eclectic, self-titled double album – affectionately known as 'The White Album'. A monumental release.
